title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban)
description: Affordable housing scheme for urban poor with interest subsidy on home loans
eligibility: EWS/LIG/MIG categories with annual income < ₹18 lakhs

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Gramin)
description: Provides pucca houses with basic amenities to rural households
eligibility: All rural households without a pucca house

title: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Income support of ₹6,000 per year to farmer families in 3 instalments

title: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Crop insurance against natural calamities, pests & diseases
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops (premium: 2% Kharif, 1.5% Rabi)

title: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Short-term credit for crop production, farm equipment & allied activities

title: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanisation (SMAM)
description: Promotes farm mechanisation through subsidies on equipment
eligibility: All farmers, Farmer Producer Organisations (FPOs), custom hiring centres

title: PM Mudra Yojana
description: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh for micro/small businesses
eligibility: All Indian citizens with a business plan

title: PM Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
description: Credit-linked subsidy for setting up new micro-enterprises
eligibility: Unemployed youth, traditional artisans, women, SC/ST, BPL

title: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for MSMEs (CGTMSE)
description: Collateral-free credit guarantee for MSME loans

title: PM e-DRIVE Scheme
description: Promotes EV adoption with subsidies & charging infrastructure
eligibility: EV buyers, manufacturers, charging station operators

title: Mission Shakti
description: Safety, protection & empowerment of women through integrated schemes

title: Mission Vatsalya
description: Protection, care & welfare of children in difficult circumstances
eligibility: Children in need of care & protection, families

title: Poshan 2.0 (Mission Saksham Anganwadi)
description: Nutrition & health improvement for children, pregnant & lactating mothers

title: PM-DAKSH Yojana
description: Skill development & competency enhancement for SCs, OBCs & others
eligibility: Scheduled Castes, OBCs, Safai Karamcharis, etc.

title: National Fellowship & Scholarship for ST Students
description: Financial support for higher education of ST students
eligibility: Scheduled Tribe (ST) students pursuing higher education

title: National Overseas Scholarship Scheme
description: Scholarship for ST students to pursue Master's/PhD abroad
eligibility: ST students with family income < ₹6 lakh/year

title: Biopharma SHAKTI
description: ₹10,000 crore plan to make India a leader in biopharmaceuticals

title: Atal Tinkering Labs
description: STEM labs to foster innovation & creativity in school students

title: Mukhyamantri Mazi Ladki Bahin Yojana
description: Women empowerment scheme with financial assistance & skill development

title: Maharashtra Rural Drinking Water Policy 2026
description: Addresses long-term water scarcity in rural areas

title: Chief Minister Farmers Power Discount Scheme
description: Free/subsidised electricity for farmers

title: Maharashtra AI Policy 2026
description: Promotes AI research, innovation & governance; trains 2 lakh youth in AI
eligibility: Youth, professionals, AI startups in Maharashtra

title: Maharashtra Unmanned Systems Policy 2026
description: Promotes drones & robotics in agriculture, surveillance & logistics
eligibility: Drone manufacturers, agri-tech startups, government agencies

title: Maharashtra Pink e-Rickshaw Scheme
description: Empowers women through subsidised e-rickshaw ownership
eligibility: Women residents of Maharashtra (subsidy: 20% + 70% bank loan)

title: Mahila Samman Scheme (MSRTC)
description: 50% travel discount for women on MSRTC buses

title: Senior Citizen Travel Concession (MSRTC)
description: 50% travel discount for passengers aged 65-75 years

title: Maharashtra Emergency Medical Services Scheme
description: Operational ambulances for emergency medical services

title: Textile Power Subsidy Cluster Scheme
description: ₹3.00/unit power subsidy for private spinning mills under cluster
eligibility: Textile spinning mills in Maharashtra clusters

title: Industrial Promotion Subsidy (IPS)
description: Subsidy for industrial units to promote investment & employment
eligibility: MSMEs & large industries in Maharashtra (MIDC areas)

title: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC/ST/OBC
description: Reimbursement of education fees & examination fees for SC/ST/OBC students

title: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
description: Monthly pension for BPL senior citizens aged 60+ years

title: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme
description: Monthly pension for BPL widows

title: National Handloom Development Programme
description: Comprehensive support for handloom weavers including yarn supply & marketing

title: Raw Material Supply Scheme (RMSS)
description: Supply of raw materials to handloom weavers at subsidised rates

title: National Handicraft Development Programme
description: End-to-end support for handicraft artisans including design & marketing

title: Comprehensive Handicrafts Cluster Development Scheme (CHCDS)
description: Cluster-based development for handicraft artisans

title: Coir Vikas Yojana
description: Promotes coir sector through skill development, technology & marketing

title: PM-DevINE Scheme
description: Infrastructure & social development projects for North Eastern Region
eligibility: NER states, youth & women of NER

title: PM-AASHA Scheme
description: Price support & procurement for farmers to ensure remunerative prices

title: Venture Capital Fund for Scheduled Castes (VCF-SC)
description: Concessional finance (₹10 lakh–₹5 crore) for SC entrepreneurs

title: Adivasi Shiksha Rrinn Yojana
description: Education loan up to ₹10 lakh @ 6% p.a. for ST students pursuing professional/technical education
eligibility: ST students for professional/technical education in India

title: Science Stream Scholarship Scheme
description: 12,000 scholarships per year @ ₹0.80 lakh/year for B.Sc/M.Sc in natural/basic sciences
eligibility: Students aged 17-22 years in natural/basic sciences

title: Garima Greh
description: Shelter, food, medical care & rehabilitation for destitute/abandoned transgender persons

title: Gharaunda (Group Home for Adults)
description: Group homes for adults with disabilities covered under National Trust Act
